name: movie-paradise
description: Instala dependencias del server (incl. multer), seed de películas y arranca API + frontend.

scripts.install:all: npm run install:server && npm run install:client
scripts.blockbuster: npm run install:server && npm run seed:movies --prefix server && npx concurrently -n api,web -c blue,yellow "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm start --prefix client"
